completed: Fixed Mentor Visibility regression in Class Detail UI
Relaxed HOD department restriction in facultyController.js
Enabled global faculty fetching in ClassDetail.jsx
Implemented robust mentor name fallback rendering in ClassDetail UI

decisions.context: Interdisciplinary mapping enabled but HODs were restricted to their own department in the backend.
decisions.decision: Relaxed HOD query filter in getFaculty to honor requested departmentId or default to global directory.
decisions.trade_offs: Slightly increased load on faculty API (limit 500) but necessary for cross-departmental visibility.
